title: Innodata Reports Third Quarter 2024 Results; Record 136% Revenue Growth Year-Over-Year
text: Innodata announced exceptional third-quarter performance with record revenue of $52.2 million, representing substantial year-over-year expansion. The company achieved net income of $17.4 million, or $0.60 per basic share, compared to $0.4 million in the prior year period. Adjusted EBITDA surged 337% to $13.9 million. Cash position strengthened to $26.4 million from $13.8 million at year-end 2023. Sequential revenue increased 60% from Q2's $32.6 million. The company expanded its enterprise customer roster to encompass five of the Magnificent Seven tech companies, plus one prominent artificial intelligence research organization and a social media platform. Management announced securing an eighth major technology customer during the quarter, along with a second federal government agency contract. Management raised full-year 2024 guidance to between 88% and 92% revenue growth, attributing momentum to continued investments by major technology firms in generative AI initiatives. CEO Jack Abuhoff emphasized confidence in capturing market opportunities, stating the team's dedication enabled them to meet or exceed the expectations of some of the most demanding, fast-moving companies.
